title: oxytropis japonica var. sericea
intro: Oxytropis japonica var. sericea, also known as the Japanese Oxystyles or Japanese Milk-vetch, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Oxytropis japonica var. sericea is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
